title: Allow Connect Board column to be required
excerpt:
Description
Currently, Connect Board columns aren’t able to be marked as a required column which means key data may be missing when an item is created.

posts.author: mitchell.hudson (Mitchell hudson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Currently, Connect Board columns aren’t able to be marked as a required column which means key data may be missing when an item is created.

What are you trying to achieve

Enforce a user to select a connected item when creating or updating an item
